raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>2025 I made a reservation with Amex Travel, booking confirmation XX/XX/XXXXXXXX, with my Business Platinum Card ending in XXXX XXXX During the checkout process, Amex online travel portal requested I select the card to be charged. I was presented with XXXX identical options : XXXX ( Platinum ) XXXX ( Platinum ) Both options appear identical. I also have an Amex XXXX XXXX XXXX card that ends in XXXX. I selected XXXX of the XXXX options and I was requested to put in my Expiration Date, Security CXX/XX/XXXXe, and Zip cXX/XX/XXXXe. I input the information for my business platinum card and submitted the trip reservation and the reservation was processed. 

A couple days later, I noted the charge was not charged to my business platinum card and was instead charged to my XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXXcard. 

My business platinum card has a card benefit that provide a {$300.00} statement credit for specific travel purchases made and this travel purchase would qualify for the statement credit. I also have the same benefit with my XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXX card and had already used the benefit prior to this reservation. Amex travel refuses to correct the issue and charge the correct card. Amex credit card company refuses to open a fraud dispute for the incorrectly charged card.
